name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.17: GYM-CORE playable — fifth and final gym. FOREMAN ATLAS on the rotation/tank/no-STAB track — 4 FOREMAN trainers (GIRDER/STRUT/RIVET/BEAM) on CORE-type creatures (ARMOTE/RISKIT/CISCOTL/PIPELYNX), leader team rotates one of each type (KERNITE/ANDOWL/BUFFROG/SCHEDOG/GRAFTLE), ROUND-ROBIN + WEB status flavor, fifth badge bit (CORE=16). Five badges complete; only VOID at SECTOR-9 remains. Carries forward v0.16's GYM-DATA (COURIER HERMES, swarm/multi-hit/RNG, badge DATA=8), v0.15's GYM-PROC (CONDUCTOR TEMPO, speed/interrupts, badge PROC=4), v0.14's GYM-MEM (WARDEN SOMA, slow/status, badge MEM=2), v0.13's catch loop (cc-dex-sync.py writes cinder.creature.caught + cinder.dex.milestone rows into cinder.db), v0.12's GYM-LOGIC (ARCHIVIST EOS, badge LOGIC=1), v0.11's USB-driven encounter pool, 56 cinderized creature sprites, 16 script events, playable starter scenes, 5 sound FX, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
